title: Digest — Mar 24, 2026, 08:32 AM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog Digest

Hello, fellow settlers! We’ve made significant strides recently with a variety of enhancements, bug fixes, and new features to enrich your colony sim experience. Here’s a roundup of what’s been merged into the main branch since our last update.

## Expedition Enhancements
- **Exploration System**: Dwarves can now embark on expeditions to explore ancient ruins scattered across the overworld, with loot, survival rolls, and encounters awaiting them.
- **Auto-Task Management**: We improved how dwarves handle tasks when returning from or dying during an expedition, ensuring smoother transitions and preventing task-related errors. Orphaned tasks are now automatically reclaimed.

## Bug Fixes
- **Brewing Improvements**: The automatic brewing feature now correctly filters out stone blocks, so ensure you're using the right materials!
- **Pathfinding Optimization**: Dwarves will no longer wait indefinitely if their path is blocked; they'll actively find alternative routes around occupied tiles.
- **Task Completion Clarity**: We resolved an issue where the mine designation overlay would persist after a task's completion.

## UI Improvements
- **Build Menu Upgrade**: You’ll now see material costs and stock counts next to build options, helping you plan your construction better. Build options that lack sufficient materials will clearly show this in red.
- **Visibility Enhancements**: Blocked-build tiles have a more visible background, making it clearer when an area can't be used.

## Code Quality
- **Refactoring**: Shared functions have been extracted and simplified, making our codebase cleaner and more maintainable.

Thank you for your ongoing support and feedback as we continue to build a vibrant world for our dwarves!

## Merged PRs
- #621
- #618
- #619
- #615
- #614
- #609
- #610

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (0 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 0
- **Avg stress:** 0
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths

prs.title: fix: clear current_task_id on expedition return/death (#620)

fix: dwarves route around occupied tiles instead of waiting forever (closes #611)
fix: clear mine designation overlay when task completes
feat: show material costs in build menu, improve blocked-build visibility
feat: expedition system — send dwarves to explore overworld ruins
